title: NetBird 클라이언트 사용법 가이드
description: NetBird 클라이언트 사용법 가이드 documents client material for NetBird in the infrastructure domain. It is classified as an operation page for the networking-stack class, so readers can understand its topic, scope, and place in the wiki taxonomy. The page highlights Linux, with examples, commands, diagrams, or references kept close to the relevant explanation. Important search terms include wireguard, client, netbird 클라이언트 사용법 가이드, infrastructure, and networking, helping both humans and generated indexes connect this page with adjacent concepts. The route is infrastructure / networking / netbird / client, and the frontmatter keeps the canonical subject, ontology role, and navigation context aligned with repository validation. Use it for quick orientation, implementation reminders, and deeper research.
